subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished and beloved friend! For some time no word, no missive, no message, and no tidings have been received from thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت ادیب حبیب چند برید است که از آنحضرت نه جوابی نه خطابی نه سوالی نه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
